po3_analysis.notes: May 17 swept both BSL (29348.9) and SSL (28744.6), closed near open (29012.4). SSL sweep typically precedes reversal higher. Current candle (May 18) extending lower — potential London SSL sweep before NY expansion.

liquidity.notes: SSL at 28744.6 swept on May 17. Path of least resistance = toward BSL at 29705.4.

fvg_analysis.notes: Small bearish FVG at 29348.9-29372 may cap initial rally. Large bullish FVG 28853-29143 partially filled by May 11 low.

reasoning: D1 SSL sweep at 28744.6 on high-volume doji (May 17, vol 601K). 3-day pullback from 29705.4 ATH in broader HH/HL uptrend. Nearest unswept major liquidity = BSL at 29705.4.
